parameters.query: WITH a AS (DELETE FROM webhook_events WHERE processed_at < now() - interval '24 hours' RETURNING 1), b AS (DELETE FROM conversation_sessions WHERE expires_at < now() - interval '1 day' RETURNING 1), c AS (DELETE FROM rate_limit_counters WHERE window_start < now() - interval '2 days' RETURNING 1) SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM a)::int AS webhook_events_purged, (SELECT count(*) FROM b)::int AS sessions_purged, (SELECT count(*) FROM c)::int AS rate_counters_purged
